targets.query:
from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "gps_speed_mps")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "gps_speed_mps")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 3.6 }))

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "gps_satellites")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "gps_hdop")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "gps_course_deg")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "gps_fresh")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "accel_mag")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "accel_dyn")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "imu_temp_c")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gps_speed_mps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r._field == "gps_speed_mps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 3.6, _field: "gps_speed_kmh" }))
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gy85_ax" or r._field == "gy85_ay" or r._field == "gy85_az")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "max")

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "mpu_ax" or r._field == "mpu_ay" or r._field == "mpu_az")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "max")

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ax" or r._field == "ay" or r._field == "az")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "max")

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gx" or r._field == "gy" or r._field == "gz")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "max")

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "accel_mag" or r._field == "accel_dyn")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "max")

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gz")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "max")

import "math"
from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "a_lat" or r._field == "a_lon" or r._field == "ax" or r._field == "az" or r._field == "mpu_ax" or r._field == "mpu_az" or r._field == "gy85_ax" or r._field == "gy85_az")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with
      a_lat: if exists r.a_lat then r.a_lat else if exists r.az then r.az else if exists r.mpu_az then r.mpu_az else if exists r.gy85_az then r.gy85_az else 0.0,
      a_lon: if exists r.a_lon then r.a_lon else if exists r.ax then r.ax else if exists r.mpu_ax then r.mpu_ax else if exists r.gy85_ax then r.gy85_ax else 0.0,
      motion_ok: if exists r.a_lat or exists r.az or exists r.mpu_az or exists r.gy85_az then 1 else 0,
      motion_ok2: if exists r.a_lon or exists r.ax or exists r.mpu_ax or exists r.gy85_ax then 1 else 0,
  }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.motion_ok == 1 and r.motion_ok2 == 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with
      a_lat: if r.a_lat > 2.0 then 2.0 else if r.a_lat < -2.0 then -2.0 else r.a_lat,
      a_lon: if r.a_lon > 2.0 then 2.0 else if r.a_lon < -2.0 then -2.0 else r.a_lon,
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with
      decel_g: if r.a_lon < 0.0 then 0.0 - r.a_lon else 0.0,
      grip_g: math.sqrt(r.a_lat * r.a_lat + r.a_lon * r.a_lon),
      grip_pct: math.sqrt(r.a_lat * r.a_lat + r.a_lon * r.a_lon) / 1.6 * 100.0,
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "a_lat", "a_lon"])

import "math"
from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "a_lat" or r._field == "a_lon" or r._field == "ax" or r._field == "az" or r._field == "mpu_ax" or r._field == "mpu_az" or r._field == "gy85_ax" or r._field == "gy85_az")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with
      a_lat: if exists r.a_lat then r.a_lat else if exists r.az then r.az else if exists r.mpu_az then r.mpu_az else if exists r.gy85_az then r.gy85_az else 0.0,
      a_lon: if exists r.a_lon then r.a_lon else if exists r.ax then r.ax else if exists r.mpu_ax then r.mpu_ax else if exists r.gy85_ax then r.gy85_ax else 0.0,
      motion_ok: if exists r.a_lat or exists r.az or exists r.mpu_az or exists r.gy85_az then 1 else 0,
      motion_ok2: if exists r.a_lon or exists r.ax or exists r.mpu_ax or exists r.gy85_ax then 1 else 0,
  }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.motion_ok == 1 and r.motion_ok2 == 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with
      a_lat: if r.a_lat > 2.0 then 2.0 else if r.a_lat < -2.0 then -2.0 else r.a_lat,
      a_lon: if r.a_lon > 2.0 then 2.0 else if r.a_lon < -2.0 then -2.0 else r.a_lon,
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with
      decel_g: if r.a_lon < 0.0 then 0.0 - r.a_lon else 0.0,
      grip_g: math.sqrt(r.a_lat * r.a_lat + r.a_lon * r.a_lon),
      grip_pct: math.sqrt(r.a_lat * r.a_lat + r.a_lon * r.a_lon) / 1.6 * 100.0,
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "a_lat", "a_lon"])

import "math"
from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "a_lat" or r._field == "a_lon" or r._field == "ax" or r._field == "az" or r._field == "mpu_ax" or r._field == "mpu_az" or r._field == "gy85_ax" or r._field == "gy85_az")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with
      a_lat: if exists r.a_lat then r.a_lat else if exists r.az then r.az else if exists r.mpu_az then r.mpu_az else if exists r.gy85_az then r.gy85_az else 0.0,

      motion_ok2: if exists r.a_lon or exists r.ax or exists r.mpu_ax or exists r.gy85_ax then 1 else 0,
  }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.motion_ok == 1 and r.motion_ok2 == 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with

      grip_pct: math.sqrt(r.a_lat * r.a_lat + r.a_lon * r.a_lon) / 1.6 * 100.0,
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "decel_g", "grip_g"])

import "math"
from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r.gps_fix == "1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "a_lon" or r._field == "ax" or r._field == "mpu_ax" or r._field == "gy85_ax" or r._field == "gps_lat" or r._field == "gps_lon")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 200ms, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with
      a_lon: if exists r.a_lon then r.a_lon else if exists r.ax then r.ax else if exists r.mpu_ax then r.mpu_ax else if exists r.gy85_ax then r.gy85_ax else 0.0,
      motion_ok: if exists r.a_lon or exists r.ax or exists r.mpu_ax or exists r.gy85_ax then 1 else 0,
  }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.gps_lat and exists r.gps_lon and r.motion_ok == 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with a_lon: if r.a_lon > 2.0 then 2.0 else if r.a_lon < -2.0 then -2.0 else r.a_lon }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with
      decel_g: if r.a_lon < 0.0 then 0.0 - r.a_lon else 0.0,
  }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decel_g >= 0.25)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "gps_lat", "gps_lon", "decel_g"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: 煞車點（GPS 上標示減速 >=0.25g）

targets.query:
from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "dr_position" and r.device_id == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "lat_dr" or r._field == "lon_dr" or r._field == "speed_mps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 200ms, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "lat_dr", "lon_dr", "speed_mps"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.lat_dr and exists r.lon_dr)
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "${device}" and r.gps_fix == "1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gps_lat" or r._field == "gps_lon" or r._field == "gps_speed_mps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 200ms, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "gps_lat", "gps_lon", "gps_speed_mps"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.gps_lat and exists r.gps_lon)
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: 賽道走線（$device：DR + GPS，時速著色）

targets.query:
from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "esp32-kart-01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gps_speed_mps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "esp32-kart-02")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gps_speed_mps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "esp32-kart-01" and r.gps_fix == "1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gps_lat" or r._field == "gps_lon" or r._field == "gps_speed_mps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 200ms, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "gps_lat", "gps_lon", "gps_speed_mps"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.gps_lat and exists r.gps_lon)
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "decoder")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kart_telemetry" and r.device_id == "esp32-kart-02" and r.gps_fix == "1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gps_lat" or r._field == "gps_lon" or r._field == "gps_speed_mps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 200ms, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "gps_lat", "gps_lon", "gps_speed_mps"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.gps_lat and exists r.gps_lon)
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: 雙車 GPS 軌跡（#1 藍 / #2 紅）
